name: void
summary: Grid-first terminal — a hard fork of Ghostty where an N×M pane grid is a first-class rendering surface (not a window-manager bolt-on, not a tmux-style multiplexer). On cell-count change the layout auto-rebalances (cols = ⌈√N⌉, rows = ⌈N/cols⌉, cols ≥ rows); each cell carries its own cwd/env; input can broadcast to all cells. Inherits Ghostty's engine (SIMD parser, Metal/OpenGL, per-terminal threads) unchanged. Zig shared core, native Swift on macOS, GTK on Linux. Beta: grid mode only.
note: This JSON tree is the architecture SSOT (update-in-place, NOT append-only). Human viewer = ARCHITECTURE.html via `python3 serve.py`. History/decisions → CHANGELOG.md; governance → CLAUDE.md (→ project.tape) + the policy tape/md pairs (AI_POLICY · HACKING · PACKAGING · VOID_FORK · LATTICE_POLICY · LIMIT_BREAKTHROUGH · TAPE-AUDIT). This doc points only, never duplicates rule thresholds.

meta.based_on: ghostty-org/ghostty (hard fork @ 964c9e32e — 4698 files renamed Ghostty → Void; upstream history + contributor credit preserved, cherry-pick-only syncs)
meta.guard_baseline: VoidTests target — SessionManifestReclaimTests 7/7 · SessionManifestTriageTests 10/10 PASS (Xcode 26.5, `** TEST SUCCEEDED **`, #19); `zig build` VoidKit → `xcodebuild` Release Void.app build verified in release-fork CI (dispatch run, all steps success, 59M artifact, #23).
meta.migrated_from: VOID.md + VOID.log.md (domain doc pair) retired 2026-06-18 → ARCHITECTURE.json tree SSOT + ARCHITECTURE.html viewer (hexa-codex #161 / anima pattern; c4 standard). VOID.log.md folded into CHANGELOG.md.

children.name: GOVERNANCE — the one rule that defines void
children.summary: SSOT mirror of the @D directive in CLAUDE.md (→ project.tape). The grid topology contract is the load-bearing invariant; thresholds live in project.tape, this doc only points.

children.name: @D grid_auto_layout — N×M grid topology auto-rebalance
children.summary: DO: grid auto-layout preserves cols = ⌈√N⌉, rows = ⌈N/cols⌉, cols ≥ rows; per-cell cwd isolation. DONT: break grid topology on cell-count change · add manual resize handles / splits (auto-only).

children.name: Grid mode — first-class N×M tiling surface (macOS Swift app)
children.summary: The headline divergence from Ghostty: an N×M pane grid as a new renderer path, not a patch on the single-surface renderer and not a multiplexer process. Per-cell cwd/env, shared input routing, broadcast. cmd+g toggles grid <-> tab mode; cmd+ctrl+1..9 spawns into a slot (auto-rebalance); cmd+ctrl+0 broadcasts to all cells. Implemented in the native Swift macOS app.

children.name: Splits / grid layout engine
children.summary: Split-tree + view that realize the N×M tiling and auto-rebalance geometry.

children.name: Terminal controllers
children.summary: Per-window / per-surface controllers driving the grid + tab modes.

children.name: Surface views (per-cell)
children.summary: Each grid cell's SwiftUI/AppKit surface view, cwd/env-isolated.

children.name: Grid self-test
children.summary: Built-in grid topology / visual-order self-test harness.

children.name: Session persistence & restore
children.summary: mmap persist-ring-backed session continuity: on a normal restart it operates with no false alarm (topology-lost notification gated behind didRestoreAnyWindow — a normal no-restore is no longer mis-reported, #16), and a closed cell's ring is reclaimed immediately (ringsToReclaim — orphan-ring leak blocked, session-scoped, quit/restart preserved, #17). VoidTests target restored on Xcode 26.5 (#19): SessionManifestReclaimTests 7/7 + SessionManifestTriageTests 10/10 PASS.
children.note: session-restore: 정상 재시작 topology-lost 오경보 제거 + closed-surface ring 누수 차단 (#16·#17·#18); VoidTests 타깃 Xcode 26.5 빌드 복구 — unit test 7개 실행 (#19). Both VOID.md milestones complete.

children.name: Inherited Ghostty engine (Zig shared core)
children.summary: Performance inherited, not rebuilt. The SIMD VT parser, Metal (macOS) / OpenGL (Linux) renderers, and per-terminal render/read/write threads come straight from Ghostty unchanged. Zig is the shared core; the apprt layer adapts it to each platform front-end.

children.name: Terminal / VT core
children.summary: Terminal emulation, screen model, SIMD parser, unicode.

children.name: Renderer (Metal · OpenGL)
children.summary: GPU rendering backends; per-terminal render thread.

children.name: App runtime (apprt)
children.summary: Platform adapter: embedded (macOS C-ABI), GTK (Linux), none/browser/wasm.

children.name: termio · pty · font · input · config · os
children.summary: Terminal I/O, pty, font shaping/atlas, input/keymap, config parsing, OS shims.
children.path: src/termio/ · src/pty.zig · src/font/ · src/input/ · src/config/ · src/os/

children.name: libvoid C-ABI surface
children.summary: libghostty → libvoid C-ABI; old symbol names preserved where required for ABI stability.

children.name: Roadmap — planned, NOT yet implemented
children.summary: Two further directions sit on top of grid mode but are described as roadmap, not shipped features. Captured in the .roadmap.* files at repo root.

children.summary: A structured agent tool-call-stream channel beside the traditional byte stream. Planned only.

children.name: P4 — per-PR perf budget vs Ghostty baseline
children.summary: Δ-vs-ghostty perf gate on each PR. Planned only.

children.name: Fork release CI
children.summary: release-fork.yml — vX.Y.Z tag → GitHub-hosted macos-26 (Xcode 26.x + zig 0.15.2) → zig build → xcodebuild Release → ad-hoc sign → DMG + universal zip → GitHub Release. release-tag.yml (unmodified Ghostty pipeline) demoted to workflow_dispatch-only.
